ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/BettaFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/BettaFish
Language: python
微舆：人人可用的多Agent舆情分析助手，打破信息茧房，还原舆情原貌，预测未来走向，辅助决策！从0实现，不依赖任何框架。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/MiroFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish
Language: python
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
Language: python
TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
220+ Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official
Language: python
Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fishaudio/fish-speech
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fishaudio/fish-speech
Language: python
SOTA Open Source TTS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
Language: python
利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
Language: python
A curated list of awesome skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code by Anthropic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain-ai/deepagents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain-ai/deepagents
Language: python
Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain-ai/open-swe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain-ai/open-swe
Language: python
An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/BitNet
Language: python
Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: p-e-w/heretic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/p-e-w/heretic
Language: python
Fully automatic censorship removal for language models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: teng-lin/notebooklm-py
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/teng-lin/notebooklm-py
Language: python
Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vectorize-io/hindsight
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight
Language: python
Hindsight: Agent Memory That Learns

ns0:entry.ns0:title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/virattt/ai-hedge-fund
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: volcengine/OpenViking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking
Language: python
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
